calm.def: 平靜的、冷靜的、使平靜、鎮定、平靜、無風

camera.ex: He's very comfortable in front of the camera.

camp.ex: We set up camp near the river.

cancel.ex: The flight was cancelled because of bad weather.

cancer.ex: Smoking increases the risk of lung cancer.

candidate.ex: He is a leading candidate for the job.

candle.ex: The room was lit by a single candle.

candy.def: 糖果、冰糖、用糖煮、使結晶

canoe.def: 獨木舟、皮艇、乘獨木舟、划獨木舟

canvas.ex: The tent is made of heavy canvas.

canyon.ex: The helicopter flew through the canyon.

cap.def: 帽子、蓋子、最高限額、覆蓋、勝過
cap.col: bottle cap, shower cap, baseball cap

capability.ex: The company needs to expand its manufacturing capability.

capable.def: 有能力的、能幹的、可以...的

capacity.ex: The stadium has a seating capacity of 50,000.

cape.ex: The superhero wore a red cape.

capital.def: 首都、資本、大寫字母、大寫的、致命的、資本的

capital.ex: Paris is the capital of France.

capitalism.ex: The country is a stronghold of capitalism.

captain.def: 隊長、船長、上尉、首領、指揮、率領

caption.def: 標題、字幕、說明文字、加上標題

captive.def: 被俘虜的、受控制的、俘虜

captivity.ex: The animals were bred in captivity.

capture.ex: The police finally captured the criminal.

car.ex: I'm going to work by car.

card.ex: He gave me his business card.

cardboard.def: 硬紙板、硬紙板做的、不真實的

cardinal.def: 紅衣主教、樞機、基數、主要的、深紅色的

care.ex: You must take care of your health.

career.def: 職業、生涯、速度、猛衝、職業的

carefree.ex: They lived a carefree life in the countryside.

careful.ex: Be careful when you cross the street.

carriage.ex: The queen arrived in a golden carriage.

carrot.ex: She is peeling carrots for the salad.

casket.def: 首飾盒、棺材、儲存寶物於小箱內

caterpillar.ex: A caterpillar will eventually turn into a butterfly.

cattle.ex: The farmer is raising cattle for beef.

cause.col: cause damage, good cause, root cause
cause.ex: Smoking is a major cause of cancer.

caution.def: 小心、警告、告誡、警告、使小心

cavalry.ex: The cavalry charged the enemy line.

cave.def: 洞穴、山洞、使凹陷、坍塌、撤回

cavity.ex: The dentist found a cavity in my tooth.

cease.col: cease to exist, miracles never cease

celebrate.ex: They are celebrating their wedding anniversary.

celebration.ex: The festival was a great celebration of music and dance.

celery.ex: She is chopping celery for the soup.

central.ex: Education is a central part of our policy.

cereal.def: 穀物、穀類食品、禾本科植物

certainty.ex: There is no certainty that the plan will work.

champion.def: 冠軍、擁護者、第一流的、保衛、擁護

championship.ex: The team won the championship last year.

chance.def: 機會、可能性、偶然、偶然的、碰巧、偶然發生
chance.col: by chance, take a chance, second chance

chancellor.ex: He was appointed chancellor of the university.

change.def: 改變、零錢、變化、改變、兌換、變換
change.col: climate change, keep the change, broad change

changeable.ex: The weather in this region is very changeable.

character.col: main character, strong character, Chinese character

characteristic.def: 特徵、特色、特有的、典型的

charcoal.def: 木炭、炭筆、用木炭畫的畫
charcoal.ex: We used charcoal to start the barbecue.

charity.ex: Most of the money goes to charity.

charm.col: lucky charm, work like a charm

checkout.ex: I'll meet you at the checkout.
